title: daphne indica subsp. linearifolia
intro: Daphne indica subsp. linearifolia, also known as the Linear-leaved Daphne, is a plant species in the genus Daphne, belonging to the family Thymelaeaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to China, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant contains daphnetin and daphniphylline, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, providing health benefits like reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infused in tea, and its herbal preparations are also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
